data.title: Add fragile to validate-review-output.sh severity enum and score-severity consistency
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add fragile severity to validate-review-output.sh:
1. Add 'fragile' to valid_severities set at line 259: {"critical", "important", "minor", "fragile"}
2. Update score-severity consistency logic at lines 296-299: expand the important check at line 298 to also trigger when fragile is present without critical. The elif should match when 'important' OR 'fragile' is in sevs (and 'critical' is not), requiring score 3.
3. This also covers write-reviewer-findings.sh which delegates to validate-review-output.sh code-review-dispatch at line 109.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Lint passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] fragile in valid_severities at line 259
  Verify: grep -q 'fragile' plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh
- [ ] Score-severity consistency handles fragile (score 3)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL
- [ ] write-reviewer-findings.sh accepts fragile findings via delegation
  Verify: echo '{"scores":{"correctness":3},"findings":[{"severity":"fragile","category":"correctness","file":"x.py","description":"test"}],"summary":"test fragile"}' | bash plugins/dso/scripts/write-reviewer-findings.sh --output /tmp/test-fragile-wrf.json
